title: Create and write to Unity Catalog tables from external Delta clients (Beta)
body: The Unity REST API now supports write and create access to Unity Catalog external and managed Delta tables from external Delta clients such as Apache Spark. External Delta tables support full read, write, and create operations. Creating and writing to Unity Catalog managed Delta tables is available in [Beta](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types) and requires [catalog-managed commits](/aws/en/tables/features/catalog-commits) to be enabled. See [Access Databricks tables from Delta clients](/aws/en/external-access/unity-rest).

ref_links.text: Access Databricks tables from Delta clients
